falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by 3% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above a key long-term trendline would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by indicating a confirmed bullish trend, contradicting the pattern's historical bottom context.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average trading volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 200% of the 60-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would indicate extreme market participation, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal's implication of consolidation and invalidating the blowoff score's current level.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would indicate imminent market exhaustion, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and proving the current verdict incorrect by showing a clear divergence from the historical bottom pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
